bearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token. Obtain it from POST /api/auth/login

tags.name: Users
tags.description: 👤 Seeker Profile, Skills, Resume & Learning Roadmap

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: 💼 Job Listings — Browse, Post, and Manage

tags.name: Applications
tags.description: 📄 Application Lifecycle + Kanban Pipeline + Skill Gap Analysis

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: 🛡️ Admin Panel — User Moderation & Audit Logs

tags.name: Schedule
tags.description: 📅 Real Interview Scheduling (after passing AI interview)

get.summary: Get all users with optional role filter and pagination

post.summary: Create a new user (useful for provisioning admins)

patch.summary: Suspend or activate a user account

200.description: List of applications with job details

get.summary: Get all applicants for a specific job (Recruiter only)

post.summary: Apply to a job (with optional resume upload)

get.summary: View specific application with seeker profile (Recruiter — Privacy Rule enforced)

put.summary: Update application status and trigger notification + email (Recruiter only)

post.summary: Request a password reset link via email

200.description: Reset link sent if email exists

put.summary: Reset password using token from email

get.summary: Get company by ID with its open jobs
Get 5 newest open jobs (for landing page)
Get skill-matched jobs ranked by percentage (Seeker only)
All jobs posted by the logged-in recruiter
List open jobs with search, filters, and pagination
Get full job details with company info
Get logged-in user profile with skills
Recruiter views a seeker's public profile (Privacy Guarded)

403.description: Forbidden - Seeker has not applied to your jobs

post.summary: Schedule a real interview for a seeker who passed the AI interview (Recruiter only)
post.description: After reviewing the AI interview report, the recruiter schedules a real interview with a date, location/link, and optional notes. Includes time-overlap conflict detection. The seeker is notified via in-app notification AND email.

interview_id.description: ID of the AI interview that was marked as passed

scheduled_at.description: Date and time of the real interview (ISO 8601, must be in the future)

location.description: Physical location or video call link

notes.description: Any additional notes for the seeker

201.description: Interview scheduled — seeker notified via app + email

400.description: Interview not in passed state / missing fields / past date

409.description: Already scheduled or time conflict with existing schedule

get.summary: Get all interviews scheduled by this recruiter (Recruiter only)

200.description: List of scheduled interviews with seeker info

get.summary: Get seeker's own scheduled real interviews (Seeker only)
get.description: Returns all real interview appointments scheduled for the seeker, with track, date, location, and recruiter info.

200.description: List of scheduled interviews for the seeker

patch.summary: Update a scheduled interview's date, location, or notes (Recruiter only)
patch.description: Updates schedule details. Cannot update cancelled schedules. Includes time-overlap conflict detection when changing scheduled_at.

400.description: Cannot update a cancelled schedule / past date / time conflict

delete.description: Marks the schedule as cancelled and sends notification + cancellation email to the seeker.

200.description: Schedule cancelled — seeker notified via app + email
